hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; OUT=$(bunx --bun oxlint --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then printf 'oxlint failed on %s:\n%s\n' "$FILE" "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && OUT=$(bun run check-types 2>&1) && LINT=$(bunx --bun oxlint 2>&1) || { printf 'Harness sensors failed. Fix before stopping.

--- check-types ---
%s

--- oxlint ---
%s
' "$OUT" "$LINT" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
